headline: VanEck’s Gaming ETF Faces a Critical Quarter As March Rebalancing Approaches
summary: The video game industry has quietly grown into a $300 billion global market, driven by mobile gaming, live-service revenue models, and a generation of consumers who treat gaming as their primary entertainment. The VanEck Video Gaming and eSports ETF (NYSEARCA:ESPO) is one of the most direct pure-play vehicles available for tracking the video game ecosystem. ... VanEck’s Gaming ETF Faces a Critical Quarter As March Rebalancing Approaches
